calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Bruce E. Chan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Marc Cefalu, Esq. for Plaintiff: Cox, Wootton, Griffin, Hansen & Poulos, LLP.
Plaintiff's Witness: Terence Cox was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Savior Papetti and Christine Papetti as follows:
Damages $43,464.73
Costs $1,968.12, for a total of $45,432.15
Plus Interest at the legal rate.
Judgment signed in open court.
